title: Central bank keeps policy rate unchanged
article: The central bank held its benchmark interest rate steady on Thursday and signaled that inflation is easing more slowly than expected. Policymakers said they need more evidence before considering cuts. Markets reacted with modest gains while bond yields moved slightly higher.
reference_summary: The central bank left rates unchanged and said inflation is falling slower than expected, so officials want more data before cutting rates.

title: City unveils flood resilience plan
article: City officials announced a five-year flood resilience plan that includes drainage upgrades, new retention basins and early-warning systems in vulnerable neighborhoods. The project will cost about $220 million and is expected to begin this summer, pending council approval.
reference_summary: The city introduced a $220 million five-year flood plan with infrastructure upgrades and warning systems, with work expected to start this summer if approved.
